text.message: What is your deal blue ? You want something from me ?
I got none… you can’t track ?
You not even asking to trade for brick . Just wanna steal it ?
I will if you trade me, but you just robbing me over and over …
ive got the ore port blue
dont think we can stop it but
Yall could have build road to block his only win chance
But blue build down for some reason ….
guess youve got no ports tho
how am I to build roads
Trade for it . Dont matter blue a bozo
no ones trading this late bro
